title: Verses
description: Replaces the default Minecraft splash text with random Scripture verses.
body:
# Verses Splash

Replaces the default Minecraft splash text with random Scripture verses.

### Features:

- ☑ Minecraft word obsfucation via §r formatting
- ☑ Control the number of randomized words
- ☑ Select between 4 different versions
- ☑ Control text color
- ☑ Control the rotation of the text if you don't like the default -20 degrees
